name: newsapi-competitor-mentions
description: Search news and blog articles for brand, competitor, customer, or market mentions and normalize them into monitoring rows.
business_value: Competitive intelligence, market monitoring, PR alerts, and account trigger discovery.
verification_command: python3 apiified/newsapi-competitor-mentions/script.py --query '"Acme CRM" OR "Acme AI"' --from-date 2026-06-01 --sort-by publishedAt --limit 10 --output news-mentions.json
verification_result: Example fixture validates competitor/news mention rows with source, URL, publish time, and excerpt fields.
known_risks: Requires NewsAPI key and plan limits determine coverage.
Full article text usually requires publisher access.
Sentiment hints are heuristic unless backed by a separate model or ruleset.
